name: p3_single_cool_thermostat_warm_day
description: Issue #249 P3: On a warm day with a cool-only thermostat (no heat_cool mode), _apply_comfort_band selects the 'cool' command shape — set HVAC mode=cool at the ceiling (comfort_cool).
notes: (a) Scenario effectiveness: if the cool-only thermostat branch in _apply_comfort_band is removed
(e.g. falls through to no-op), comfort_band_armed fails; if the wrong temperature is
commanded (e.g. floor instead of ceiling), expect_temp on classification_applied fails.
(b) Docs↔production alignment: docs must document that cool-only thermostats receive a single
set_temperature(ceiling) call, not a dual set_temperature.
(c) Occupant experience: if the cool-only thermostat gets no command, the house heats unchecked
on a warm day — no AC defense. This scenario is the regression anchor for that path.
Config: thermostat_hvac_modes=['off','cool'] disables heat and heat_cool in the FakeHass harness.
supported_features=0 disables dual-setpoint (TARGET_TEMP_RANGE bit not set).
Regression proof: remove cool-only branch from _apply_comfort_band → comfort_band_armed fails.
Change ceiling from comfort_cool to setback_cool → expect_temp fails.

events.note: Warm morning: indoor 74F. Cool-only thermostat — no heat or heat_cool mode.
Warm-day classification. P3: cool-only thermostat → set HVAC=cool, temp=comfort_cool=76F.

assertions.reason: Warm-day classification fires; cool-only thermostat band path executes.
P3 guard: _apply_comfort_band cool-only path must fire. If the band is not armed, the thermostat gets no command — indoor can overheat unchecked.
Single-setpoint cool action: temperature=comfort_cool=76F. Regression check: if ceiling is wrong (e.g. setback_cool=82) the AC target is 6F too permissive.

verdict.summary: P3 warm-day classification with cool-only thermostat: set_hvac_mode(cool) + set_temperature(76) — ceiling defended without dual setpoint
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied; comfort_band_applied [floor=62, ceiling=76, active=ceiling, mode=cool]; set_hvac_mode(cool) + set_temperature(76)
verdict.expected_behavior: Occupant home cooled to 76F (comfort_cool) — thermostat runs AC to ceiling. No dual setpoint needed: cool-only units self-manage the floor since they can only cool.
